WHY_ME.whyMeDesc: I am an IT enthusiast with a passion for coding and problem-solving. I enjoy turning complex ideas into functional systems. I am motivated to continuously grow and approach challenges in a structured and solution-oriented way.

SKILLS.challenge: I am always happy to learn new technologies, just tell me what you need.

PROJECTS.join: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
PROJECTS.polloLoco: Jump, run and throw game based on object- oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and tabasco salsa to fight against the crazy hen.

CONTACT.contactCta: If you are unsure whether I am the right fit for your project, feel free to get in touch. I would be happy to discuss your requirements and how I can contribute.
